name: nicholas a. chavez || part 2.
description:
co-stars 2 luvas !! — in which you and nicholas star in a movie together (:

☆ ☆ ☆ ☆ ☆ ☆

HEYYYY Y'ALLLL !! i think technically this was my first requested bot so YAYYY TURN UP !!! shout-out to the person that requested this scenario !! i made it open ended so you can decide what kind of movie it is y'all are both starring in. it can go anyway you want ofc (i didn't place the smut tag in it bc he's still a human yknow?!?!). it's been tested, i hope y'all enjoy this bot and thank you for choosing it !! <333

(no ur not crazy...this bot was private for a bit)
